'''Xiunsrus''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="GG9" /> located in the [[Xiunsrus system/Legends|Xiunsrus system]], a part of the [[Quence sector/Legends|Quence sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> A small [[Farmer/Legends|farming]] village was located there.<ref name="GG9" />

One [[Local day/Legends|morning]], nearly a [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] prior to the time between<ref name="GG9" /> [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' is set in the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates those two battles to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively, and also establishes that the Battle of Yavin was the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> the [[Bloodsniffers]], a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] named after a [[Diet/Legends|predatory]] [[Bloodsniffer|creature]]<ref name="GG9" /> from<ref name="UA">''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]''</ref> the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC Kamar">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Kamar system/Legends|Kamar system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]],<ref name="UA" /> appeared on the border of the Xiunsrus village. After the settlement refused the demand of one of the gang members to hand over ten thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] that afternoon, the Bloodsniffers destroyed the village, going on to terrorize other worlds in the Quence [[Sector/Legends|sector]] over the following [[Standard year/Legends|years]].<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
Xiunsrus was mentioned in the [[1993]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', which was written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]] for [[West End Games]].<ref name="GG9" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Xiunsrus [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thereby the celestial body, in grid square P-18.<ref name="TEA" />
